subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Give thou tidings of him who hath borne tribulations in My path and whom calamities have touched, inasmuch as he hath acknowledged that which was spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم بشر من حمل الشدآئد فی سبیلی و مسته الرزایا بما اعترف علی ما نطق به
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
